moduleExplanations.invoice: Accounting invoice (not POS): create flexible invoices when prices change/negotiation happens — add items, set discount, calculate totals + print/export with the invoice theme.
moduleExplanations.sales: Manage orders, payments, sales, and shipping/delivery (if applicable).
moduleExplanations.pos: Cashier (POS): point-of-sale to manage in-store sales.
moduleExplanations.promotions: Create offers, coupons, and discounts to increase sales.
moduleExplanations.reports: Reports and analytics for sales, products, and performance.
moduleExplanations.customers: Manage customers, their data, purchase history, and communication.

business.platformDesc: An all-in-one platform for modern merchants. Design your store, manage your products, and earn with ease.
business.landingDesc: The comprehensive commerce platform for next-gen merchants. Design your store, manage your inventory, and sell your products from anywhere with the most powerful tech tools.

hero.badge: Join to be among the first — registration is free

features.subtitle: From store to orders to analytics — everything works together seamlessly.
features.pageBuilderDesc: Drag and drop to build a storefront that reflects your brand identity with professional touches — no developer needed.
features.productMgmtDesc: Add your products, update inventory, and track orders from a single dashboard clearly and quickly.
features.instantNotifDesc: Automatic instant notification when a new order or booking arrives — never miss a customer.
features.analyticsDesc: Track your sales, top-performing products, and customer behavior with clear and easy analytics.
features.mobileExpDesc: Your store runs smoothly on any device — mobile, tablet, or desktop — no setup required.
features.securityDesc: Your data and sales are protected with the latest encryption and security technologies — your peace of mind is our priority.

steps.step1Desc: Create your account in under a minute — enter your details and choose your business type.
steps.step2Desc: Use the page builder to create a store that reflects your identity — colors, images, and custom categories.
steps.step3Desc: Add your products, enable payment methods, and start receiving orders instantly.

industries.subtitle: Whether you sell clothes, run a pharmacy, or offer booking services — the platform adapts to your business.

about.desc1: We are the MNMKNK team — an integrated Arabic platform that empowers merchants to manage their business with ease and professionalism. We believe every merchant deserves world-class tools in their language at an affordable price.
about.desc2: From e-commerce to point of sale, from product management to advanced analytics — we provide everything you need to grow your business in one place.
about.arabicPlatformDesc: Designed specifically for the Arab market
about.easeOfUseDesc: No complexity or technical expertise needed
about.globalSecurityDesc: Encryption and protection with global standards
about.continuousSupportDesc: Support team available around the clock

about.title: We Build
about.subtitle: The Future of Commerce.
about.description: MNMKNK is an Egyptian platform to discover the best shops and restaurants near you with offers, ratings, and a simple, fast user experience.
about.visionText: To enable every shop in Egypt to own a world-class digital storefront and smart management system in minutes, without technical complexity.
about.techText: We use the latest AI technologies (Gemini) to guarantee real offers and a personalized shopping experience for every user.
about.betaText: MNMKNK platform is currently in Beta Test phase. This means some features may not work at their best, and we're working around the clock to improve the experience. Your feedback and suggestions are the fuel that drives us to be the best version always.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: We're here to help. You can reach us through any of the following channels:

support.title: Help Center
support.faq1Q: How can I order from the website?
support.faq1A: You can choose the product you want, add it to your cart, then complete the delivery details and confirm the order.
support.faq2A: We currently offer cash on delivery, and soon we'll provide electronic payment options.
support.faq3Q: How can I track my order?
support.faq3A: You can track your order status through the "My Orders" page in your profile.
support.stillNeedHelpDesc: Our support team is available to help you anytime

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: This page outlines the rules and terms governing your use of the MNMKNK platform. Please read them carefully.
terms.s1Content: By using the MNMKNK platform, you agree to abide by the terms of service outlined here.
terms.s2Content: The information provided when creating an account must be accurate and complete. You are responsible for keeping your account information confidential.
terms.s3Content: It is prohibited to use the platform for any illegal purposes or to violate the intellectual property rights of others.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At MNMKNK, we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This policy explains how we handle your information.
privacy.s1Content: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, phone number, and email when creating an account or placing an order.
privacy.s2Content: We use your information to process your orders, improve our services, and communicate with you about updates and offers.
privacy.s3Content: We take appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access.

returnPolicy.title: Return Policy
returnPolicy.intro: This is a general return policy page for the MNMKNK platform. Detailed policies may vary from store to store depending on the nature of products and store terms.
returnPolicy.s1Content: The return policy aims to clarify your rights and options when there's an issue with an order. Return and exchange details may vary by store.
returnPolicy.s2Content: Returns are typically accepted for products in their original condition, unused, with receipt/proof of purchase and within the timeframe specified by the store.
returnPolicy.s3Content: Some products may not be returnable, such as opened consumables, customized products, or any product specified by the store in its terms.
returnPolicy.s4Title: How to Submit a Return Request
returnPolicy.s4Content: You can contact the store directly through the available contact methods on the store page (such as phone or WhatsApp) to initiate a return request, and the store will inform you of the steps.
returnPolicy.s5Content: If a return is accepted, the refund mechanism varies depending on the payment method and store policy. Refunds may take several business days.

courier.title: Work as a delivery courier on MNMKNK
courier.intro: A quick intro page before signing up: learn how the system works and what you need to get started.
courier.tip1: Enable location sharing so nearby delivery offers reach you automatically.
courier.tip2: Enable available for orders from the courier dashboard settings.
courier.tip3: After accepting an order, you can open the map with one tap and update the order status easily.
courier.iosNote: On iPhone: open the Share button in Safari then select "Add to Home Screen" to install the courier app.
courier.note: Note: Registration is a join request, and the account is activated after admin review.
courier.f1Body: You'll receive the closest delivery offers to your location, and the first courier to accept gets the order assigned.
courier.f2Body: If you enable location sharing, the system will automatically update your location so you never miss an order.
courier.f3Body: You can track orders, collect cash (COD), and update order status from the courier dashboard.
courier.f4Body: After registration, your account will be under review by the admin before activation.
courier.faq1Q: Do I have to enable location?
courier.faq1A: Highly recommended. Without location, you might miss many offers because the system can't match you with nearby orders.
courier.faq2Q: Can I start immediately after registration?
courier.faq2A: Your account will be under review, and after approval you can log in and access the courier dashboard.

seo.title: MNMKNK - The Comprehensive Directory in Egypt
seo.intro: If you're looking for a shop directory, restaurant directory, or activity directory, MNMKNK platform brings nearby places to you with offers and ratings on one page.
seo.shopsGuideDesc: Discover nearby shops by location, category, and available offers.
seo.restaurantsGuideDesc: See the best nearby restaurants with the latest offers, photos, and reviews.
seo.activitiesGuideDesc: Various places and activities you can easily find through the MNMKNK map.
seo.faq1A: MNMKNK is an Egyptian platform that helps you find nearby shops, restaurants, and activities quickly and easily.
seo.faq2Q: Is MNMKNK suitable for finding shop and restaurant directories?
seo.faq2A: Yes, because the platform focuses on shop and restaurant directories with a map, offers, and ratings.

faq.a1: MNMKNK is a directory platform that helps you discover shops, restaurants, and activities near you easily.
faq.q2: Is MNMKNK a directory of shops and restaurants?
faq.a2: Yes, MNMKNK provides a directory of shops, restaurants, and activities all in one place.

blog.pageSubtitle: Tips and ideas to grow your business

post1.title: How to Start Your Online Store in 5 Steps
post1.excerpt: A practical guide to building a successful digital store from scratch — from choosing your niche to your first sale.
post1.p1: Creating an online store no longer requires a coding expert or a huge budget. In this guide, we take you step by step from idea to your first real sale.
post1.p2: Step 1: Define your business type — Do you sell clothes? Food products? Booking services? Defining your activity helps you choose the right tools.
post1.p3: Step 2: Register on an all-in-one platform like MNMKNK — In less than a minute, you'll have a merchant account ready to go.
post1.p4: Step 3: Design your store interface — Use the page builder to choose colors, images, and categories that reflect your brand identity.
post1.p5: Step 4: Add your products — Upload images, set prices, and organize products into clear categories.
post1.p6: Step 5: Start selling — Enable payment methods, share your store link, and receive your first orders!

post2.title: Secrets to Effective Inventory Management
post2.excerpt: Learn best practices for inventory management to reduce waste and increase profits.
post2.p1: Inventory management is one of the biggest challenges any merchant faces — whether they run a supermarket, a clothing store, or a pharmacy.
post2.p2: Problem 1: Products expiring. The solution? An automatic alert system that notifies you before a product runs out or expires.
post2.p3: Problem 2: Too many items and hard to track. The solution? A clear dashboard that shows every product, its stock, and its status at a glance.
post2.p4: Problem 3: Over-ordering or under-ordering. The solution? Sales reports help you forecast demand and order the right quantities.
post2.p5: On MNMKNK, all inventory management tools are available in one place — no need for separate software or complex spreadsheets.

post3.title: Why Do You Need an All-in-One Platform for Your Store?
post3.excerpt: How a single platform saves you the time and effort of managing multiple separate tools.
post3.p1: Many merchants use separate tools — one for inventory, an app for orders, a website for analytics. The result? Chaos and wasted time.
post3.p2: An all-in-one platform means everything in one place: the store, orders, inventory, analytics, and notifications.
post3.p3: Save time: Instead of opening 5 programs, open one place and find everything ready.
post3.p4: Save money: One subscription instead of paying for each program separately.
post3.p5: Greater accuracy: Data is automatically synced — no errors from manual transfer between systems.
post3.p6: MNMKNK was designed to be the only platform you need to manage your store from A to Z.

post4.title: Digital Marketing Guide for Beginners
post4.excerpt: The most important digital marketing strategies every merchant should know to increase sales.
post4.p1: Digital marketing is no longer optional — it's the foundation of any successful business. But where do you start?
post4.p2: First: Know your audience — Who are your customers? What are they looking for? Where do they spend time online?
post4.p3: Second: Work on real content — Professional product photos, clear descriptions, and special offers.
post4.p4: Third: Use social media — Share your products on Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.
post4.p5: Fourth: Measure results — Track who visits your store, what they buy, and what they ignore.
post4.p6: Fifth: Improve continuously — Change images, try new offers, and focus on what works.

post5.title: Mobile-First Store Design
post5.excerpt: 80% of customers browse on mobile — Learn how to create a store that captures their attention.
post5.p1: If your store doesn't work well on mobile, you're losing 80% of your potential customers.
post5.p2: Rule 1: Speed — The page must load in under 3 seconds. Large, slow images make customers leave.
post5.p3: Rule 2: Simplicity — The simpler the interface, the easier it is to use. No need for complex design.
post5.p4: Rule 3: Clear buy button — The customer must find the "Buy Now" button without searching for it.
post5.p5: Rule 4: Clear images — Product images must be clear even on a small screen.
post5.p6: On MNMKNK, all stores automatically work on mobile without any additional settings.

post6.title: Protecting Your Store and Customer Data
post6.excerpt: How to ensure your data and your customers' data are safe — without being a tech expert.
post6.p1: Data security is not a luxury — it's a responsibility to your customers and your store's reputation.
post6.p2: Encryption: Make sure payment data and personal information are encrypted. On MNMKNK, all data is encrypted with world-class technologies.
post6.p3: Passwords: Use a strong password and change it regularly. There's no excuse for a password like "123456".
post6.p4: Backups: Your data should be stored in more than one place. The platform performs automatic backups.
post6.p5: Access permissions: If you have employees, give each one only the permissions they need — nothing extra.
post6.p6: Updates: Make sure the platform updates automatically to close any new security vulnerabilities.
